- Partition `model.model.layers` across ranks
- Rank 0: embed_tokens + its layers
- Last rank: its layers + norm + lm_head + loss
- Middle ranks: just layers
- AFAB: all forwards first, then all backwards
- Use P2POp for communication between stages
- Scale loss by number of microbatches
